data_coverage_summary: Onshape REST API / Glassworks has public documentation that indicates engineering and product-lifecycle records across parts, assemblies, documents, changes. Public Onshape developer documentation and API explorer are available.
buyer_guidance: Use this API family for product, BOM, and engineering-document integration, not for streaming operational telemetry. Onshape should be treated as a rest api surface for engineering and product-lifecycle records.
overview: Public documentation reviewed for Onshape REST API / Glassworks indicates Public Onshape developer documentation and API explorer are available. The documented surface aligns with engineering and product-lifecycle records and covers parts, assemblies, documents, changes. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: The public documentation indicates engineering-record access for product structures, documents, and controlled change workflows rather than live machine telemetry.
data_points: Bills of material and engineering structures
Change, release, or lifecycle workflow state

ingest_considerations: The public source for Onshape REST API / Glassworks is documentation-oriented, so live access still depends on vendor-issued credentials, tenant configuration, or customer enablement.
This row is modeled as engineering and product-lifecycle records, so downstream integrations should scope data collection and writeback around those documented business workflows.
No exact public machine-readable JSON or YAML artifact was confirmed during this pass, so the documentation URL remains the primary evidence anchor.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Public Onshape developer documentation and API explorer are available.
